stemHtml:
An aircraft is cruising at FL100. A nearby meteorological station which is situated at an elevation of 1500 ft gives a QNH of 990 hPa. The aircraft measures an OAT of 0°C. Calculate the aircraft's clearance from the highest obstacle on their route, which is a mountain of 5000 ft elevation.
(Assume 1 hPa = 30 ft)
